trickyParts: The early return 'if (doneIssueIds.length === 0) { return; }' had to be removed so the directory scan runs even when there are no Done issues — the first/second passes are no-ops when the set is empty
listDir made optional in RepoManagerDeps to avoid breaking all existing test fixtures that don't provide it
Workspace scanning uses shallow scan (direct children only) per workspace-scanning-patterns.md — never recurse into workspaces
basename(entry) used for issueId derivation per workspace-scanning-patterns.md
deviations: Bug 1 fix: The issue said 'one-line addition to serialization' but the actual fix was adding repo/issueNumber to WorkerEntrySchema explicitly. The passthrough() already preserved them at runtime, but explicit schema fields ensure proper typing and validation.
listDir added as optional (not required) to avoid breaking existing test fixtures
openQuestions: Should the directory scan also use the default deps (defaultDeps.listDir) when opts.repoManagerDeps is undefined? Currently it only runs when opts.repoManagerDeps?.listDir is provided.
The directory scan removes workspaces but does NOT call jj workspace forget — this is intentional since we don't know the repo for off-board workspaces. Is this acceptable?
